title: acetosa limoniastrum
intro: Acetosa limoniastrum, also known as the Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the oxalis family. It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Acetosa limoniastrum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting urinary tract health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
